answers.question: Code organization
answers.answer: Flat files in agents/ directory. reference_codebase_context.rs and codebase_to_spec.rs.

answers.question: Traits
answers.answer: Implement Agent trait. Use LLMProvider + complete_structured(). CodebaseToSpecAgent uses CRRCycle with ReviewAgent internally.

answers.question: External consumers
answers.answer: Conductor is the only consumer, on feature branch. Safe to rename.
